name: Family Facts
description: Family relationships, birthdays, and lineage facts for memory testing.
statements: My father's name is Robert, and he was born on June 12, 1965.
My mother, Elena, celebrates her birthday on March 22, 1968.
I have an older sister named Sofia who was born on November 5, 1992.
My younger brother, Luca, was born on August 14, 1998.
I am married to Clara; our wedding anniversary is September 20, 2022.
We have a daughter named Mia, born on February 10, 2024.
My paternal grandfather was named Henry, and my paternal grandmother was Margaret.
My mother's parents (my maternal grandparents) are named Giovanni and Maria.
Sofia is married to Marco, and they have a son named Leo.
Leo was born on July 3, 2025, making him my first nephew.
My brother Luca is currently dating a girl named Giulia.
Robert and Elena live in Milan, while Sofia and Marco live in Rome.
My daughter Mia's middle name is Elena, after her grandmother.

questions.q: What is my father's name and when was he born?
When is my mother Elena's birthday?
Who are my siblings and what are their birth dates?
When is my wedding anniversary with Clara?
What is my daughter's name and her birth date?
What are the names of my maternal grandparents?
Who is Leo and when was he born?
What is the name of my sister's husband?
Where do Sofia and Marco live?
What is my daughter's middle name and who is she named after?
